svg.text: IS-IS L2 + MPLS LDP · iBGP full mesh: VPNv4 + IPv4-unicast (next-hop-self) · MEL-PE1 = inter-region ASBR (eBGP 64496↔65002 → DC-P-R1) · MEL-P = transport handoff to PC1 · doc ASNs/prefixes (RFC 5398/5737/3849)
Internet Edge — simulated (doc ASNs/prefixes; never advertised to the real Internet)
Aurora AS 64496 — Cisco P/PE core (IS-IS L2 + LDP · iBGP VPNv4 + IPv4-unicast full mesh · MPLS L3VPN)
Tenant workloads — Region B/PC1 Docker offload

SLURM lab assertions (RFC 8416) — no real ROAs
4× IOS-XRv backbone started; MEL pair IS-IS/LDP
Archived (ADR-003): Nokia core (SR Linux P + SR OS PE1/PE2) cold-stored,
recoverable. Juniper → Region B (vSRX/vJunos) + cloud cRPD; vSRX standalone-
Guardrail: behavioural lab only. ASNs 64496–64502 = RFC 5398 doc ASNs; IPv4 =
RFC 5737, IPv6 = RFC 3849 doc space. No public Internet / registered RIR RPKI.
